jobs.title: Implementation Manager, Customer Success
jobs.content: <p><strong>Implementation Manager, Customer Success</strong></p><p>Checkr is the API-driven background-screening + identity-verification platform pioneered around people-trust-as-a-service & FCRA-compliant continuous monitoring.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Python Engineer, Truework
jobs.content: <p>Lead Checkr's Truework income / employment verification engineering function across the CheckrX FCRA-compliant tenant-facing platform.</p>
